zh.lifeSummary: Etinette von Dol於0915年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉沙吉馬洛。她和Geoffrey Juhel de Mayenne I至少有1個兒子。她去世在法國皮卡迪。

nameMeanings.name: Dol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Gerrit, Cornelis, Kees, Dirk, Klaas, Pieter.  German Erwin, Gerhard, Otto.
Dutch and German: variant of   Bolle  .
French: from Bol(l)o, a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the element bolo ‘friend’, ‘brother’.

variants.name: Bolle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Ilse, Kurt, Manfred, Otto.  Scandinavian Arlys.
German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo, a short form of various compound names with the first element bald ‘bold’.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Bolo, Bollo, a short form of various compound names with the first element bolo ‘friend’, ‘brother’.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Etinette von Dol was born in 0915, in Saint-Malo, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France. She had at least 1 son with Geoffrey Juhel de Mayenne I. She died in Picardie, France.

ja.lifeSummary: Etinette von Dolは0915年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインサイント-マロで生まれた。彼女はGeoffrey Juhel de Mayenne Iとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女はフランスピカーディで死去した。

ko.Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니
ko.lifeSummary: Etinette von Dol(은)는 0915년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 세인트-마로에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Geoffrey Juhel de Mayenne I(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 프랑스 피카디에서 사망했다.
